---
name: Channel proposal
about: Propose a new Telegram channel for the 50-channel taxonomy
title: '[channel] <channel_name>:<bucket>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Channel Details

**Channel name:** @...

**Public link:** https://t.me/s/...

**Bucket:** (ai_core / dev / indie_solo / news_aggregate / stack_specific / hype_listicle / en_peer)

## Information

- **Followers:** (approximate)
- **Post frequency:** (e.g., 2-3x/week)
- **Topic area:** (brief description)

## Rationale

Why this channel fits the chosen bucket and adds value to the taxonomy.

## Verification

Maintainers will run `python -m ru_pulse.probe <channel_name>` to verify the channel is public and active.
